summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 9 NEW features integrated from FX Trading Dashboard: Fragility Engine, Event Engine + Economic Calendar, Risk Control Center, Execution Gate, Signal Scoring System, Daily PnL Chart, Signal Feed, Slippage Stats + Spread Monitoring, Multi-Tier Exit Structure. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified working.

issues: Panels are slightly cramped when all 7 panels display in a row - consider responsive layout adjustments for smaller screens

passed_tests: Fragility Engine: GET /api/fragility returns level, score, components (spread/volatility/price_shock/liquidity/regime), triggers, size_multiplier
Event Calendar: GET /api/events/calendar?hours_ahead=48 returns events list with oil-specific data and state with cooldown info
Event Trigger: POST /api/events/trigger/eia_inventory activates cooldown for high-impact events
Event State: GET /api/events/state returns cooldown_active, risk_modifier, halt_trading
Risk Control Status: GET /api/risk-control/status returns level, 5 rules, equity, today_pnl, cooldown, consecutive_losses
Risk Rules: GET /api/risk-control/rules evaluates all 5 rules with Chinese labels
Exit Tiers: GET /api/risk-control/exit-tiers returns 4 tiers (WARNING/PRE_REDUCE/MAIN_STOP/DISASTER)
Daily PnL: GET /api/risk-control/daily-pnl returns history array
Slippage Stats: GET /api/risk-control/slippage returns count, avg_ticks, max_ticks
Execution Gate: GET /api/execution-gate/CL returns gate_status (OPEN/CAUTION/PARTIAL/CLOSED) and 8 checks
Signal Score CL: GET /api/signal-score/CL returns score (-100 to 100), direction, zone, 8 components, bullish_pct, bearish_pct
Signal Score BZ: GET /api/signal-score/BZ returns same structure for Brent
Signal Score NG: GET /api/signal-score/NG returns same structure for Natural Gas
Existing endpoints still work: GET /api/system/status, GET /api/options/chain/CL, GET /api/notifications
Frontend: Fragility Engine panel with score, level badge, component bars, triggers
Frontend: Signal Score panel with bull/bear bar, component breakdown
Frontend: Execution Gate panel with gate status, 8 checks with pass/warn/fail indicators
Frontend: Risk Control Center panel with level badge, 5 rules list, equity snapshot
Frontend: Oil Market Events panel with event list and cooldown state bar
Frontend: Daily PnL (7 Days) section visible
Frontend: Multi-Tier Exit Structure with 4 tiers (WARNING -50%, PRE_REDUCE -70%, MAIN_STOP -100%, DISASTER -150%)
Frontend: Notification bell in header with dropdown showing event notifications
seed_data_creation: None required - all tests use API-generated data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 new features from FX Trading Dashboard are fully functional. Chinese labels are intentional (user's language). Event engine has 10 oil-specific events (EIA Inventory, OPEC+, US CPI, NFP, China PMI, Fed Decision, Hormuz Risk, Baker Hughes, Middle East Escalation, API Inventory). Cooldown system activates for 15 minutes after high-impact events. WebSocket now includes fragility and event_state data. All existing features from iterations 1-5 continue to work correctly.

mocked_apis.note: No real broker APIs used. All data is simulated locally. Event engine uses predefined oil market events.

fragility_engine.returns: level (low/moderate/high/extreme), score (0-100), components (5 factors), triggers, size_multiplier

risk_control_center.features: 5 risk rules, 4-tier exit structure, daily PnL tracking, slippage monitoring

signal_scorer.returns: score (-100 to 100), direction, zone, 8 components, bullish_pct, bearish_pct
